field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '方单', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'name', 'usage_date', 'document_date_text', 'labor_usage_document_no', 'labor_usage_status_display']}, {'title': '项目与劳务单位', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'labor_usage_project_name', 'contractor_id', 'labor_usage_labor_team_name', 'labor_team', 'foreman_name', 'recorder_id']}, {'title': '作业内容', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['labor_usage_title', 'construction_part', 'labor_usage_construction_part', 'work_content', 'labor_usage_work_content', 'labor_usage_work_type']}, {'title': '数量与金额', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['worker_qty', 'work_hours', 'labor_usage_quantity', 'labor_usage_price_unit', 'labor_usage_amount', 'amount_total', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '结算状态', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_settlement_state', 'legacy_settlement_status', 'labor_usage_settlement_status', 'legacy_settlement_amount']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'labor_usage_note', 'attachment_ids', 'labor_usage_attachment_text']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'legacy_acceptance_label', 'source_created_by',
